raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The penalty increase will ensure individuals are held accountable for their predatory actions and breach of trust in medical settings.",
    "AB 848 will increase penalties for felony sexual battery by fraud in a hospital setting to a sentence of four, six, or eight years and a fine of up to $20,000.",
    "Current law provides for a sentence of two, three, or four years and a fine of up to $10,000 for felony sexual battery by fraud.",
    "AB 849 will require healthcare facilities that offer ultrasounds to notify and provide patients with medical chaperones before conducting an ultrasound on sensitive regions.",
    "AB 849 will establish new standards for chaperone training to ensure hospital staff are educated on identifying non-standard behavior."
  ]
}
```
